name: Modal
searchText: modal an accessible overlay dialog @mantine/core /core/modal centered children closebuttonprops closeonclickoutside closeonescape fullscreen id keepmounted lockscroll onclose onentertransitionend onexittransitionend opened overlayprops padding portalprops radius removescrollprops returnfocus scrollareacomponent shadow size stackid title transitionprops trapfocus withclosebutton withoverlay withinportal xoffset yoffset zindex

props.name: centered
props.description: If set, the modal is centered vertically

props.name: children
props.description: Modal content

props.name: closeButtonProps
props.description: Props passed down to the close button

props.name: closeOnClickOutside
props.description: If set, the modal/drawer is closed when user clicks on the overlay

props.name: closeOnEscape
props.description: If set, onClose is called when user presses the escape key

props.name: fullScreen
props.description: If set, the modal takes the entire screen

props.name: id
props.description: Id used to connect modal/drawer with body and title

props.name: keepMounted
props.description: If set modal/drawer is not unmounted from the DOM when hidden. display: none styles are applied instead.

props.name: lockScroll
props.description: If set, scroll is locked when opened={true}

props.name: onClose
props.description: Called when modal/drawer is closed

props.name: onEnterTransitionEnd
props.description: Called when enter transition ends

props.name: onExitTransitionEnd
props.description: Called when exit transition ends

props.name: opened
props.description: Controls opened state

props.name: overlayProps
props.description: Props passed down to the Overlay component, use to configure opacity, background-color, styles and other properties

props.name: padding
props.description: Key of theme.spacing or any valid CSS value to set content, header and footer padding

props.name: portalProps
props.description: Props passed down to the Portal component when withinPortal is set

props.name: radius
props.description: Key of theme.radius or any valid CSS value to set border-radius

props.name: removeScrollProps
props.description: Props passed down to react-remove-scroll, can be used to customize scroll lock behavior

props.name: returnFocus
props.description: If set, focus is returned to the last active element when onClose is called

props.name: scrollAreaComponent
props.description: Scroll area component

props.name: shadow
props.description: Key of theme.shadows or any valid CSS box-shadow value

props.name: size
props.description: Controls width of the content area

props.name: stackId
props.description: Id of the modal in the Modal.Stack

props.name: title
props.description: Modal title

props.name: transitionProps
props.description: Props added to the Transition component that used to animate overlay and body, use to configure duration and animation type, { duration: 200, transition: 'fade-down' } by default

props.name: trapFocus
props.description: If set, focus is trapped within the modal/drawer

props.name: withCloseButton
props.description: If set, the close button is rendered

props.name: withOverlay
props.description: If set, the overlay is rendered

props.name: withinPortal
props.description: If set, the component is rendered inside Portal

props.name: xOffset
props.description: Left/right modal offset

props.name: yOffset
props.description: Top/bottom modal offset

props.name: zIndex
props.description: z-index CSS property of the root element
